ncitools.io package

Submodules

ncitools.io.fixers module

PDB fixing (PDBFixer) and hydrogen optimisation (xTB/ASE).

ncitools.io.fixers.fixPDB(pdb, add_hydrogens, pH=7.4)[source]
ncitools.io.fixers.optimize_hydrogens(filename, charge=0)[source]

ncitools.io.readers module

ncitools.io.readers.read_pdb(file)[source]
